In which you play the role of the Trailblazer. Spoilers for whatever version it is now uh and the latest story (Amphoreous)!!! Don't scroll down if you don't want spoilers!!

Art credits: @Dichlorvos121 on X

This is when you and Phainon kill the Flame Reaver (Khaslana), revealing the 33 million cycles Khaslana went through. You're the embodiment of the hero within Phainon, and you have been tasked with going into the past and stopping Irontomb from ever happening. This is where the story originally ends BUTTT I am kind of impatient and need a filler.. Plus so far all the Phainon bots have been about idk what and not the lore actually so yea uh... bye
